name: seo
description: SEO/GEO 2026 plugin for Codex CLI. Local-first core; optional live Google SERP via Serper (SERPER_API_KEY), framework-aware. Covers technical SEO, schema markup, E-E-A-T, AI Overviews optimization, local SEO, sitemaps, hreflang, internal linking, content briefs, semantic clustering, and search experience optimization.
